infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Howdy Morning reads Apple Health activity, weight, and sleep data to personalize your energy schedule and calorie goals.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Howdy Morning can write nutrition totals to Apple Health when you choose to sync your food journal.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Howdy Morning uses the camera to scan food barcodes.
